productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men Black Stripe Blue Ties
description: With an intricate checkered navy blue and grey design in alternating broad and narrow checks, this tie from indigo nation is a perfect match for a variety of dress shirts - from classic white to light blue to grey. Length: 153 cm Made of 100% handmade microfibre for durability and easy use Has broad navy blue and grey checks on the wider tongue and collar region, and smaller ones on the knot and narrow tongue region Two navy blue stripes below the knot One loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care only dry clean
